title: arnica cordifolia subsp. genuina
intro: Arnica cordifolia subsp. genuina, also known as mountain arnica, is a flowering plant species within the sunflower family (Asteraceae) native to North America. The plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and pain-relieving compounds, making it a popular remedy for treating injuries, bruises, and sprains. The health benefits of arnica cordifolia subsp. genuina include reducing inflammation, promoting wound healing, and alleviating symptoms of arthritis and other musculoskeletal conditions. Herbal preparations of arnica cordifolia subsp. genuina typically involve infusing the flowers in oil or water to create topical creams, salves, and tinctures that can be applied directly to the affected area.
